title: Avocado Toasty Flatbread
description: A delicious and easy-to-make flatbread topped with creamy avocado, crispy toasty, and a hint of german flair.
instructions: Preheat your toaster or toaster oven to 350°F (180°C).
Toast the flatbread for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned.
Mash the avocado in a bowl until smooth.
Spread the mashed avocado on top of the toasted flatbread.
Sprinkle crushed toasty on top of the avocado.
Season with salt to taste, if desired.
Cut into halves or quarters and serve immediately.
